title: Senior Software Engineer - Ninjacart Digital Technologies - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Ninjacart Digital Technologies - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Ninjacart Digital Technologies. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Software Engineer to strengthen our Amritsar-based team.

About Ninjacart Digital Technologies:
Ninjacart Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ninjacart Digital Technologies!
